title: Neither Peace Nor War: Iran Conflict Leaves World in Dangerous Limbo
summary_full: Since announcing a nominal cease-fire two months ago, Iran, Israel and the U.S. have remained locked in low-intensity violence that has become a new normal.
summary_public: Since announcing a nominal cease-fire two months ago, Iran, Israel and the U.S. have remained locked in low-intensity violence that has become a new normal.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel and the U.S. have remained locked in low-intensity violence
